kw.name: Open Browser No Popup

test.name: TC_001 — Successful Login With Valid Credentials
test.doc: Navigate to the login page, enter valid credentials and verify the user is redirected to the secure area with a success message.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: No keyword with name 'Open Browser No Popup' found. Did you try using keyword 'SeleniumLibrary.Open Browser' and forgot to use enough whitespace between keyword and arguments?

test.name: TC_002 — Login Failure With Incorrect Password
test.doc: Navigate to the login page, enter a wrong password and verify the user stays on the login page with an invalid password error.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: No keyword with name 'Open Browser No Popup' found. Did you try using keyword 'SeleniumLibrary.Open Browser' and forgot to use enough whitespace between keyword and arguments?

test.name: TC_003 — Login Failure With Incorrect Username
test.doc: Navigate to the login page, enter a wrong username and verify the user stays on the login page with an invalid username error.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: No keyword with name 'Open Browser No Popup' found. Did you try using keyword 'SeleniumLibrary.Open Browser' and forgot to use enough whitespace between keyword and arguments?
